verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Heavenly Father, I appreciate you, Heavenly Father, I appreciate you, I love you, adore you, I bow down before you, Heavenly Father, I appreciate you.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Holy Spirit You're a comfort to me Holy Spirit You're a comfort to me You lead me, You guide me, You're dwelling inside me Holy Spirit You're a comfort to me.
